✉ SEND INVOICE BY EMAIL
Sends the invoice · recipient gets a formatted copy instantly
⚙ EmailJS not configured — click Email Setup below to set up free email sending.
⚙ EMAIL SETUP — EmailJS
Free · 200 emails/month · no server · 5 minute setup
Setup steps (5 minutes):
1. Go to emailjs.com and create a free account
2. Click Add New Service → connect Gmail or Outlook
3. Click Email Templates → Create New Template
4. In the template body, add: {{message}} and {{invoice_html}}
5. Save and copy the 3 keys below
Account → General → Public Key
Email Services → click your service
Email Templates → click your template
TEMPLATE VARIABLES TO USE:
{{to_name}} {{to_email}} {{subject}} {{message}} {{invoice_html}} {{invoice_number}} {{from_name}}
⚠ DATA QUALITY — Items Missing Required Fields
Product ID and Category are required · click ✎ Fix to resolve each item
Product ID Product Name Category Issues Action
Fix all items then Re-scan to confirm
